zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Mortimer於1271年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素時，他的父親Robert de Mortimer25歲，母親Joyce de la Zouche16歲。他於大約1289年與Matilda Hereford在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年7月20日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Mortimer was born in 1271, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Mortimer, was 25 and his mother, Joyce de la Zouche, was 16. He married Matilda Hereford about 1289, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 20 July 1304, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimerが1271年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルで生まれた時，父Robert de Mortimerは25歳，母Joyce de la Zoucheは16歳であった。約1289年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでMatilda Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年7月20日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスター スト マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Worcester St. Mary, Worcestershire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Mortimer(이)가 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Mortimer(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce de la Zouche(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Matilda Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 7월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터 스트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Mortimer nasceu em 1271, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Mortimer, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joyce de la Zouche, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Hereford aproximadamente 1289, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1304, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Worcester St. Mary, Worcestershire, Engl: ворсестир ст мэри, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Mortimer родился в 1271 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Mortimer было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce de la Zouche, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Hereford около 1289 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1304 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир ст мэри, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Worcester St. Mary, Worcestershire, Engl: Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Mortimer nació en 1271, en Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Mortimer, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joyce de la Zouche, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Matilda Hereford aproximadamente 1289, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1304, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
